_format: one entry per corpus file: {"<file>.md": {"origin": url, "license": spdx-or-note, "retrieved": ISO-date, "kind": "spec | platform-docs | user-requests | adapted-benchmark"}} — imported tasks also get an entry keyed by their upstream id: {"skillsbench:<task-id>": {"origin": repo-url, "commit": sha, "license": ...}}
_rules: independence: nothing authored by or derived from any skill under test; source at the need/spec level, not the how-to level; see ../../README.md § Corpus rules
